title: Youtube Poop: Haruhi Farts
description:
Hey Captpan I got a really good idea!  Can you make a video where haruhi farts? :P  lol I want to see one from you!


capt, i like your vids and all, but i hate your haruhi poops.  Theyre annoying and don't make sense.  Can you please not make them unless you actualy do something funny with her, like make her SHOOP DA WHOP or fart.


Have you ever thought about making Haruhi fart in one of your videos?  I don't see a lot of people use that gag anymore.


I love your vids so much!  Btw can you make another Haruhi Youtube Poop?  Call it "Haruhi Farts" lol
Peace!
